title: Grangers Down Wash | 300ml | Cleans, Refreshes and Restores the Loft and Appearance of All Down and Synthetic Down

features: POWERFUL CLEANING – Down Wash is a concentrated, easy-to-use, cleaner formulated for down and synthetic down. It removes dirt and odours from all down jackets, insulated sleeping bags and duvets.
RESTORES LOFT – As well as powerful cleaning this product is specifically formulated to restore loft, keeping you warm once more.
MAXIMISES BREATHABILITY – As well as powerful cleaning, it maximises breathability, offering comfort and protection.

ECO-RESPONSIBLE – ECO-RESPONSIBLE – Grangers’ products are cruelty-free, eco-friendly and made with the environment in mind. The water-based PFC-free (fluorocarbon free), bluesign approved formulations and keep you warm and dry, while protecting the world we all love to explore. Down Wash 300ml now comes in a 100% Recycled Bottle and further helps to reduce Grangers’ carbon footprint.
SUITABLE FOR GORE-TEX – This wash-in cleaner is suitable for all men and women’s breathable, waterproof insulated clothing and membranes including Gore-Tex, eVent and FutureLight.
description: This concentrated, wash-in cleaner ensures your down or synthetic down-filled gear is clean and fresh, keeping you warm and dry for longer. New formula now offers 12 washes instead of 6 – doubling the life of the bottle!
